requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Frequency — VNPT and MOIT requirements for wireless-capable equipment
requirement_topic.zh: EMC / 射频 — 无线设备越南电信和工贸部要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC / 射頻 — 無線設備越南電信和工貿部要求

summary.en: Vietnam's electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) and radio frequency (RF) requirements for industrial equipment are administered by VNPT (Vietnam Posts and Telecommunications Group) and overseen by the Ministry of Information and Communications (MIC) for wireless/radio aspects, and by MOIT for energy-related equipment. Standard industrial three-phase induction motors without integrated wireless or variable-speed drive electronics are not typically subject to Vietnam RF/wireless type approval. However, if a motor incorporates a variable speed drive (VSD), inverter, or wireless monitoring module, the integrated product may require conformity assessment under Vietnam's telecommunications regulatory framework. EMC baseline is aligned with TCVN/IEC standards.
summary.zh: 越南工业设备的电磁兼容性（EMC）和射频（RF）要求，无线/射频方面由越南邮电集团（VNPT）和信息通信部（MIC）管理，能效相关设备则由工贸部管理。标准工业三相感应电动机（不含集成无线或变速驱动电子元件）通常无需接受越南射频/无线型式认可。但若电动机集成了变频器（VSD）、逆变器或无线监控模块，集成产品可能须按越南电信监管框架进行合格评定。EMC 基线与 TCVN/IEC 标准对齐。
summary.zht: 越南工業設備的電磁相容性（EMC）和射頻（RF）要求，無線/射頻方面由越南郵電集團（VNPT）和信息通信部（MIC）管理，能效相關設備則由工貿部管理。標準工業三相感應電動機（不含整合無線或變速驅動電子元件）通常無需接受越南射頻/無線型式認可。但若電動機整合了變頻器（VSD）、逆變器或無線監控模組，整合產品可能須按越南電信監管框架進行合格評定。EMC 基線與 TCVN/IEC 標準對齊。

standards_or_laws: VNPT type approval framework for radio equipment

summary.en: In China, EMC requirements for industrial motors are covered under GB/T 10069 series (measurement of airborne noise) and general EMC standards GB/T 17626 series. Motors with integrated inverters or VSD are subject to additional EMC requirements under GB/T 12668 (adjustable-speed drive systems). CCC certification for motors within scope includes electromagnetic disturbance testing per relevant GB standards. China's CCC EMC test results are not directly recognised by Vietnam's MIC or MOIT for market access purposes.
summary.zh: 在中国，工业电动机的 EMC 要求涵盖 GB/T 10069 系列（空气传播噪声测量）和通用 EMC 标准 GB/T 17626 系列。集成逆变器或变频器的电动机须满足 GB/T 12668（调速传动系统）的额外 EMC 要求。CCC 认证范围内的电动机包含按相关 GB 标准进行的电磁干扰测试。中国 CCC EMC 测试结果不被越南信息通信部或工贸部直接认可用于市场准入。
summary.zht: 在中國，工業電動機的 EMC 要求涵蓋 GB/T 10069 系列（空氣傳播噪音量測）和通用 EMC 標準 GB/T 17626 系列。整合逆變器或變頻器的電動機須滿足 GB/T 12668（調速傳動系統）的額外 EMC 要求。CCC 認證範圍內的電動機包含按相關 GB 標準進行的電磁干擾測試。中國 CCC EMC 測試結果不被越南信息通信部或工貿部直接認可用於市場准入。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (EMC immunity/emission for industrial equipment)

gap.en: Standard three-phase induction motors without integrated wireless or drive electronics face minimal Vietnam-specific EMC procedural requirements beyond the QCVN 04:2009/BCT energy efficiency compliance path. The main gap arises for motors with integrated VSDs or wireless modules: these require Vietnam MIC/VNPT type approval in addition to MOIT energy label compliance. Chinese CCC EMC documentation is not accepted as a substitute. Exporters should verify whether their motor configuration includes any wireless or active power-electronics components that would trigger Vietnam RF type approval.
gap.zh: 标准三相感应电动机（不含集成无线或驱动电子元件）在越南 EMC 程序方面的额外要求极少，主要遵循 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效合规路径。主要差距体现在集成变频器或无线模块的电动机上：这类产品除须满足工贸部能效标签合规外，还需取得越南信息通信部/VNPT 型式认可。中国 CCC EMC 文件不被接受为替代。出口商应核实其电动机配置是否包含任何会触发越南射频型式认可要求的无线或有源电力电子元件。
gap.zht: 標準三相感應電動機（不含整合無線或驅動電子元件）在越南 EMC 程序方面的額外要求極少，主要遵循 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效合規路徑。主要差距體現在整合變頻器或無線模組的電動機上：此類產品除須滿足工貿部能效標籤合規外，還需取得越南信息通信部/VNPT 型式認可。中國 CCC EMC 文件不被接受為替代。出口商應核實其電動機配置是否包含任何會觸發越南射頻型式認可要求的無線或有源電力電子元件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — standard motors: minimal Vietnam EMC barrier beyond QCVN 04 path; motors with integrated VSD/wireless: MIC/VNPT type approval additionally required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for in-scope products) — CCC includes EMC testing; GB/T 17626 series applies; not recognised in Vietnam

source.publisher: Ministry of Information and Communications (MIC), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard three-phase induction motors without wireless or inverter integration face minimal Vietnam EMC procedural barriers beyond the QCVN 04:2009/BCT energy path. Motors with integrated VSDs or wireless modules require separate Vietnam MIC/VNPT type approval; Chinese CCC EMC documentation is not a substitute. Verify motor configuration before export. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不含无线或逆变器集成的标准三相感应电动机，在越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效路径之外几乎无额外 EMC 程序障碍。集成变频器或无线模块的电动机须另行取得越南信息通信部/VNPT 型式认可；中国 CCC EMC 文件不可替代。出口前应核实电动机配置。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不含無線或逆變器整合的標準三相感應電動機，在越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效路徑之外幾乎無額外 EMC 程序障礙。整合變頻器或無線模組的電動機須另行取得越南信息通信部/VNPT 型式認可；中國 CCC EMC 文件不可替代。出口前應核實電動機配置。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — TCVN / IEC 60034 insulation and low-voltage safety for grid connection
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — TCVN / IEC 60034 绝缘和低压安全（电网接入）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — TCVN / IEC 60034 絕緣和低壓安全（電網接入）

summary.en: Vietnam's electrical safety requirements for industrial motors align with TCVN standards adopting IEC 60034 series (rotating electrical machines). The Vietnam grid for three-phase motors is 380/220 V, 50 Hz — identical to China's standard three-phase supply, eliminating voltage/frequency adaptation requirements. Insulation class, temperature rise, and protection degree (IP rating) requirements follow IEC 60034 as adopted by TCVN. MOIT and the Vietnam Electricity Regulatory Authority (ERAV) oversee electrical safety in the energy sector. No separate Vietnam low-voltage directive equivalent to the EU LVD currently applies; the QCVN 04:2009/BCT energy efficiency conformity path covers the main regulatory gate for motor imports.
summary.zh: 越南工业电动机电气安全要求参照采用 IEC 60034 系列（旋转电机）的 TCVN 标准。越南三相电动机电网电压为 380/220 V、50 Hz，与中国标准三相供电相同，无需电压/频率适配。绝缘等级、温升及防护等级（IP等级）要求按 TCVN 采用的 IEC 60034 执行。工贸部和越南电力监管局（ERAV）负责能源领域电气安全监管。越南目前尚无等同于欧盟低压指令的独立低压法规；QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效合规路径是电动机进口的主要监管关卡。
summary.zht: 越南工業電動機電氣安全要求參照採用 IEC 60034 系列（旋轉電機）的 TCVN 標準。越南三相電動機電網電壓為 380/220 V、50 Hz，與中國標準三相供電相同，無需電壓/頻率適配。絕緣等級、溫升及防護等級（IP等級）要求按 TCVN 採用的 IEC 60034 執行。工貿部和越南電力監管局（ERAV）負責能源領域電氣安全監管。越南目前尚無等同於歐盟低壓指令的獨立低壓法規；QCVN 04:2009/BCT 能效合規路徑是電動機進口的主要監管關卡。

standards_or_laws: TCVN / IEC 60034 series (rotating electrical machines — insulation, temperature rise, IP rating)
QCVN 04:2009/BCT (main regulatory gate for motor imports)

summary.en: Chinese industrial motors are manufactured to GB/T 755 (Rating and Performance of Rotating Electrical Machines, aligned with IEC 60034-1) and GB 12665 (Motor Cooling Requirements). The 380/220 V, 50 Hz grid specification is identical between China and Vietnam, so motors designed for the Chinese market are electrically compatible with the Vietnam grid without modification. CCC certification for low-voltage motors covers basic electrical safety including insulation and temperature rise per the relevant GB/T standards.
summary.zh: 中国工业电动机按 GB/T 755（旋转电机额定值与性能，与 IEC 60034-1 对齐）和 GB 12665（电动机冷却要求）制造。中越两国均为 380/220 V、50 Hz 电网，针对中国市场设计的电动机无需改动即可在越南电网使用。低压电动机的 CCC 认证涵盖基本电气安全，包括按相关 GB/T 标准进行的绝缘和温升检测。
summary.zht: 中國工業電動機按 GB/T 755（旋轉電機額定值與性能，與 IEC 60034-1 對齊）和 GB 12665（電動機冷卻要求）製造。中越兩國均為 380/220 V、50 Hz 電網，針對中國市場設計的電動機無需改動即可在越南電網使用。低壓電動機的 CCC 認證涵蓋基本電氣安全，包括按相關 GB/T 標準進行的絕緣和溫升檢測。

gap.en: Vietnam's 380/220 V, 50 Hz three-phase grid is identical to China's, so no voltage or frequency modification is required for standard Chinese motors exported to Vietnam. The electrical safety technical gap is minimal because both countries' standards align with IEC 60034 series via TCVN and GB/T 755 respectively. The procedural gap is that Chinese CCC electrical safety documentation is not accepted by Vietnam; QUATEST testing under QCVN 04:2009/BCT covers the main conformity gate and implicitly addresses safety performance.
gap.zh: 越南 380/220 V、50 Hz 三相电网与中国相同，出口越南的标准中国电动机无需任何电压或频率改装。两国标准均通过 TCVN 和 GB/T 755 与 IEC 60034 系列对齐，电气安全技术差距极小。程序差距在于越南不接受中国 CCC 电气安全文件；QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下的 QUATEST 检测是主要合规关卡，并隐性覆盖安全性能要求。
gap.zht: 越南 380/220 V、50 Hz 三相電網與中國相同，出口越南的標準中國電動機無需任何電壓或頻率改裝。兩國標準均通過 TCVN 和 GB/T 755 與 IEC 60034 系列對齊，電氣安全技術差距極小。程序差距在於越南不接受中國 CCC 電氣安全文件；QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下的 QUATEST 檢測是主要合規關卡，並隱性覆蓋安全性能要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory baseline — TCVN/IEC 60034 electrical safety alignment required; QUATEST QCVN 04:2009/BCT path is the main regulatory gate; no separate Vietnam LVD equivalent
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 755 + CCC for in-scope motors; 380 V 50 Hz grid identical to Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors designed for 380/220 V, 50 Hz are electrically compatible with the Vietnam grid without modification. The electrical safety technical gap is minimal given shared IEC 60034 alignment, but Chinese CCC documentation does not substitute for Vietnam QUATEST testing under QCVN 04:2009/BCT. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 针对 380/220 V、50 Hz 设计的中国电动机与越南电网完全电气兼容，无需改装。鉴于两国均与 IEC 60034 对齐，电气安全技术差距极小，但中国 CCC 文件不能替代越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下的 QUATEST 检测。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 針對 380/220 V、50 Hz 設計的中國電動機與越南電網完全電氣相容，無需改裝。鑑於兩國均與 IEC 60034 對齊，電氣安全技術差距極小，但中國 CCC 文件不能替代越南 QCVN 04:2009/BCT 下的 QUATEST 檢測。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
